hypothesis.strategy: Improve 3 lowest-scoring articles (knowledge-distillation, automated-peer-review, curriculum-learning) with new 2026 papers, formative assessment diagram, and cross-links
hypothesis.reasoning: knowledge-distillation (sourcing=69, currency=72) needs more references; automated-peer-review (depth=53) needs expansion with AAAI-26 pilot and formative assessment section; curriculum-learning (currency=61) needs 2026 papers on E2H, Actor-Curator, SEC

articles_improved.changes: Added 5 new 2026 papers (E2H Reasoner, Actor-Curator, SEC, ADCL, Curriculum Pretraining), expanded current state section, added cross-links to knowledge-distillation and transfer-learning
Added 4 new papers (OPSD, OPCD, Walmart e-commerce distillation, MPCoT), new sections on self-distillation and e-commerce search distillation
Added AAAI-26 pilot program, prompt injection vulnerability reference, new 'Automated Review as Learning Tool' section with formative assessment SVG diagram, pedagogical benefits subsection

result.lesson: Curriculum-learning had the largest gain (+7.4) from 5 new 2026 papers boosting currency from 61 to high 80s. Adding new technical sections (formative assessment for peer-review, self-distillation for KD) reliably boosts depth. E-commerce search distillation papers strengthen connections between core concepts and frontier topics.
